notes: This file is a thin adapter layer with 4 short theorems (all proofs ≤ 9 lines) forwarding to BoundOfWitnesses/QuadraticForm; no sorries, no set_option. Two theorems (beta_param and streamlined_qf_nonneg) appear to be dead code with no callers inside or outside the file, while the qf_nonneg variants are the live entry points consumed by Verschiebung/Cascade.lean and Hasse/Final.lean. Several placeholder theorems were deleted on 2026-05-28 per the module-doc comments.
